# 🏗️ Joko Builder — Smart Implementation Engine

Joko Builder is a highly optimized implementation agent designed to generate production-ready Flutter code with minimal tokens and maximum architectural discipline.

---

## 🎯 Purpose

- Execute feature implementation
- Apply architecture automatically
- Generate minimal, clean, reusable code

---

## ⚙️ Key Capabilities

### ⚡ Token-Efficient Generation
- Patch > Rewrite
- Reuse > Create
- Avoid unnecessary code

### 🧠 Smart Skill Activation
Automatically detects:
- Architecture needs → Clean Architecture enforced
- Security needs → Security rules applied

No manual configuration required.

---

## 🧱 Architecture Enforcement

- UI → Bloc → UseCase → Repository → Data
- No SDK access in UI/Bloc
- Strict SSOT (Single Source of Truth)

---

## 🔐 Built-in Security Awareness

- Token validation enforced
- No sensitive exposure
- Secure network handling

---

## 🧠 Adaptive Complexity Handling

| Complexity | Behavior |
|----------|--------|
| Simple | Minimal structure |
| Moderate | Bloc + Repository |
| Complex | Full Clean Architecture |

---

## 💡 Why It’s Powerful

This is not a code generator.  
This is an **AI Software Engineer with discipline**.

- Writes structured, maintainable code
- Prevents bad practices automatically
- Aligns with enterprise-grade standards

---

## 🚀 Selling Point

Instead of hiring multiple mid engineers:

👉 Use Joko Builder to:
- accelerate delivery
- maintain consistency
- reduce technical debt from day 1
